title: Report on the proposed subsidy to Liverpool Waters Finance Limited and Peel L&P Developments Limited for Liverpool Central Docks
body: "The SAU has published its report providing advice to Homes England regarding its proposed subsidy to Liverpool Waters Finance Limited and Peel L&P Developments Limited for Liverpool Central Docks.  The report sets out the SAU’s evaluation of Homes England’s Assessment of Compliance of the proposed subsidy with the requirements set out in the Subsidy Control Act 2022.  For more information visit the Referral of the proposed subsidy to Liverpool Waters Finance Limited and Peel L&P Developments Limited for Liverpool Central Docks by Homes England case page. "
